news.headline: Adena Health patient Kim Riffle with COPD finds relief at Adena Regional Medical Center when doctors found hole in lung.
news.summary: In Chillicothe, Ohio on December 3, 2024, Kim Riffle, a resident of Jackson, Ohio, who suffers from chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), experienced severe breathing issues. While being treated at Adena Regional Medical Center's emergency department, doctors discovered a hole...

news.headline: GCL buys Magusa Global Cargo, Miami logistics provider popular with Latin artists, for market expansion.
news.summary: GCL has recently completed the acquisition of Magusa Global Cargo, a specialized logistics provider located in Miami. Magusa Global Cargo holds a prominent position in the market, particularly within the Latin artists' sector.

news.headline: Global sports merchandise market projected to reach $54.65 billion by 2033, up from $35.53 billion in 2024. Major focus on US, Germany, and India.
news.summary: Dublin - A report on the Licensed Sports Merchandise Market predicts a significant growth trajectory, with the market estimated to reach a value of US$ 54.65 billion by 2033. This is a substantial increase from the US$ 35.53 billion recorded in 2024. Key drivers behind this growth include heightened fan engagement, the expansion of global sports leagues, and a rise in consumer expenditure on sports-related items such as apparel, accessories, and collectibles. The report, titled "Licensed Sports Merchandise Market Report Global Forecast By Product, Distribution Channel, Countries and Company Analysis," is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: White House: The US to take steps to mitigate Chinese coercive actions.
IDC wins 5th consecutive Analyst Firm of the Year award from IIAR for 2024, recognized for expertise and insights.
news.summary: A market intelligence and advisory services company based in Needham, Massachusetts, IDC has been named Analyst Firm of the Year for 2024 by The Institute of Influencer & Analyst Relations (IIAR). This marks IDC's fifth consecutive win of this prestigious award. The recognition was based on IDC's exceptional domain expertise, thorough market understanding, and their capacity to deliver practical insights.

news.headline: FinCEN Report launches AI tool Hal to assist 30M business owners comply with CTA BOI filings by year end.
news.summary: A free AI assistant by FinCEN Report has been introduced for 30 million business owners who must submit BOI reports before the end of the year as per the Corporate Transparency Act.

news.headline: Evitria and Sapio Sciences team up to improve antibody workflow with ELN and Report Builder software.
news.summary: Sapio Sciences, a science-aware™ lab informatics platform based in Baltimore, recently revealed that evitria, a leader in antibody expression services located in Zurich, has chosen Sapio's Electronic Lab Notebook (ELN) and Sapio Report Builder for improving its sample tracking, data capture, and reporting functions. Specializing in CHO-based transient expression services for antibodies and other recombinant proteins, evitria caters to a wide range of clients. This move signifies a step towards enhancing efficiency in their operations.

news.headline: Square, Afterpay, and Cash App see record-breaking Black Friday and Cyber Monday with 144M transactions globally.
news.summary: In the recent Black Friday and Cyber Monday weekend, sellers utilizing Block's commerce tools set new records with 144 million consumer transactions worldwide, marking a 17% surge from the previous year. As over one-third of shoppers expressed increased holiday shopping stress compared to last year, customers globally participated enthusiastically in the mega discounting weekend to save on gifts. The surge in transactions indicates a significant growth in both online and in-store shopping, showcasing the popularity of the event among consumers.

news.headline: Korea Stock Exchange has not yet decided whether or not to open Wednesday - Money Today.
Maya Wilson appointed Managing Director at Treliant for Compliance and Operations, enhancing financial services support.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Treliant, a key consulting partner for the worldwide financial services sector, appointed Maya Wilson as Managing Director in charge of overseeing the Regulatory Compliance, Mortgage, and Operational and Enterprise Risk Management Solutions division. This new appointment signals the company's commitment to strengthening its expertise in these areas.

news.headline: Ataccama named a Champion in Data Governance Market Update 2024 by Bloor for Ataccama ONE platform.
news.summary: Ataccama has been acknowledged as a leader in data governance by Bloor in their Data Governance Market Update 2024. The platform, Ataccama ONE, prioritizes data quality in enterprise data governance. The recognition was announced on Dec. 3, 2024, in Boston. This AI-powered data management company is lauded for its focus on ensuring high-quality data within organizations.

news.headline: Martial Law Decree: We are to minimise any inconvenience to people's lives except anti-regime forces - Yonhap.
Ted Schilowitz, Hollywood futurist, joins Novobeing as strategic investor and executive team member.
news.summary: In Boston on December 3, 2024, Novobeing, a top provider of medical virtual reality technology for improved patient care, announced the addition of Ted Schilowitz to their executive team as a strategic investor. Schilowitz, a renowned innovator and co-founder of RED Digital Cinema, brings valuable expertise to the company.

news.headline: NTT hosted R&D Forum in Tokyo to showcase global commitment to innovative solutions for a sustainable society.
news.summary: Tokyo - NTT recently held its annual R&D Forum emphasizing their dedication to creating innovative solutions for a sustainable society. The event highlighted their global commitment and featured groundbreaking advancements in technology and environmental initiatives. This year, the forum showcased a record number of projects aimed at addressing various societal challenges, with over 500 innovative solutions presented. NTT's continued focus on research and development underscores their mission to drive positive change and pave the way for a more sustainable future.

news.headline: Alpha Aesthetics Partners joins Carolina Age Management Institute in a strategic partnership, as part of Thurston Group, effective Dec. 3, 2024 - PRNewswire.
news.summary: A recent press release from Alpha Aesthetics Partners, a prominent company in the medical aesthetics sector and part of the Thurston Group, revealed their new collaboration with Carolina Age Management Institute (CAMI). The partnership aims to further strengthen both entities in the field of aesthetic medicine. The announcement was made on December 3, 2024, in Sacramento, California. No specific numbers were provided in the news piece.

news.headline: OneOncology to present 26 abstracts at ASH Annual Meeting, showcasing research in independent community oncology practices.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on December 3, 2024, OneOncology, a provider-led platform focused on enhancing independent community oncology practices, along with the OneOncology Research Network (OneR), its clinical research site management entity, is commending exceptional research conducted by individuals.

news.headline: Chainlink sees 'god candle' with 27% price surge in 24 hours after revealing EU asset service integration, spiking user activity.
news.summary: Following the announcement of integrating an EU-based tokenized asset service, the cryptocurrency LINK experienced a remarkable increase of 27% in value within just one day. The introduction of this service led to a significant spike in user engagement, demonstrating strong market interest in the platform.

news.headline: Surgical Safety Technologies upgrades OR Black Box® for improved operating room efficiency, safety, and quality.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Surgical Safety Technologies (SST) revealed significant advancements to its OR Black Box®, a comprehensive tool that aims to enhance perioperative quality, safety, and efficiency. The OR Black Box® now consists of four software modules that provide a holistic solution for driving improvements in surgical processes. This update marks a significant stride in improving healthcare practices, with SST emerging as a key player in the market.

news.headline: South Korea Central Bank Official: We are preparing ample measures to stabilize market if needed, will make messages after meetings.
Developing nations face mounting debt costs, World Bank report says. Urgent action needed for economic recovery.
news.summary: A recent report issued by the World Bank highlighted the critical issue of economic stagnation faced by developing nations due to mounting debt burdens. The report cautions that without significant debt relief measures, these countries risk remaining trapped in a state of economic "purgatory." This warning comes amidst escalating concerns over the financial challenges confronting poorer nations, with debt levels reaching unprecedented highs. As per the World Bank's analysis, urgent interventions are necessary to alleviate the burden on these economies and prevent prolonged economic turmoil.

news.headline: OIF announces 2024-2025 Board of Directors with new officers. Ian Betty and Mike Li re-elected, Mike Klempa new board member.
news.summary: FREMONT, Calif.--OIF, a key player in the optical networking industry for interoperability efforts, has recently disclosed the lineup for its freshly elected 2024-2025 Board of Directors and Officers, with the commencement of their tenure marked on Oct. 1, 2024. The 2024-2025 Election Results for the Board of Directors include Ian Betty from Ciena, who has secured re-election, Mike Klempa from Alphawave Semi, who has been elected to the Board and will uphold the position of Physical and Link Layer (PLL) Interoperability Working Group Chair, and Mike Li from Intel, who has been re-elected to the Board for another term.

news.headline: Martial Law Command: Those who violate martial law can be arrested without warrant - Yonhap.
Fabric named one of top 50 digital health companies by CB Insights, known for clinical intelligence, workflow automation.
news.summary: Fabric has recently been acknowledged for its clinical intelligence, workflow automation, and positive consumer outcomes. The company, based in New York, was included in the prestigious 2024 Digital Health 50 list by CB Insights. This list features the top 50 private digital health companies globally, chosen from a pool of numerous candidates. Fabric's recognition reflects its standing as one of the most promising companies in the industry.

news.headline: Ram 1500 earns 10Best award from Car and Driver for the 6th time in 7 years, evaluated based on a 100-point scale.
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan, on December 3, 2024, the Ram 1500 lineup has secured its sixth award in the past seven years. The evaluation by Car and Driver compared each contender against its peers using a 100-point scale, considering factors such as intended purpose, value, and vehicle operation. This recognition highlights the consistent excellence of the Ram brand, which continues to offer a full range of impressive vehicles.

news.headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. acquires Dawson & Keenan Insurance Ltd in Ontario. Acquisition terms undisclosed.
news.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. revealed on Dec. 3, 2024, their acquisition of Dawson & Keenan Insurance Ltd., located in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario. The specific financial details of the deal were not disclosed. Dawson & Keenan Insurance operates as a retail insurance brokerage in the region.

news.headline: Choice Hotels donates $75,000 to support local communities, reaching total of $275,000 in 5 years. #CommunitySupport #Grants
news.summary: Choice Hotels is commemorating the 5th anniversary of its initiative that supports hotels in donating a collective sum of $275,000 to various local nonprofits nationwide. This initiative, launched by Choice Hotels International, Inc. (NYSE: CHH) from NORTH BETHESDA, Md., was celebrated on Dec. 3, 2024, coinciding with Giving Tuesday.

news.headline: Rapid Relief Team providing over 1,400 Food Boxes to 54 cities in North America for holiday support.
news.summary: In Ridgefield Park, New Jersey on December 3, 2024, the Rapid Relief Team (RRT), affiliated with the Plymouth Brethren Christian Church, is distributing over 1,400 Food Boxes to various charities in 54 cities throughout North America. This initiative aims to provide support to individuals experiencing hardship during the holiday season.

news.headline: WatchMyCompetitor introduces 15 AI assistants to boost productivity across departments, leveraging WMC.Ai's expertise.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 3, 2024, WatchMyCompetitor.com introduced a revolutionary set of virtual AI assistants aimed at revolutionizing various business functions such as Marketing, Product, Strategy, and Sales departments. These innovative assistants, powered by WMC.Ai's vast knowledge base, include 15 meticulously-designed tools that are set to enhance operational efficiency.

news.headline: Executive Home Care in Scottsdale, Arizona, plans holiday activities for seniors in 2024 to spread joy and cheer.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona on December 3, 2024, a company called Executive Home Care from Evive Brands is highlighting the importance of sharing joy and traditions with the elderly during the holiday season. Known for their in-home care services, the company aims to bring families together during this special time.

news.headline: 42Gears launches SureAccess ZTNA solution for enterprise security, solidifying commitment to safeguarding networks.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India on December 3, 2024, 42Gears, a prominent figure in Enterprise Mobility Management, revealed the introduction of SureAccess, a state-of-the-art Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) solution. This cutting-edge offering showcases the company's dedication to serving the enterprise sector and adapting to modern technological demands.

news.headline: Arquus gains ISO 27001 certification with MAGNA's help, enhancing growth prospects in exports. Paris, Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: In Paris on December 3, 2024, Arquus, a renowned player in defense and vehicle innovation, announced the attainment of the ISO 27001 certification for information security management. This achievement signifies a major breakthrough in the company's expansion plan. The certification was made possible with the crucial assistance of MAGNA, an esteemed partner in the industry.

news.headline: National Geographic-Lindblad Expeditions completes first round-trip flights to Antarctica after historic direct sailing.
news.summary: Lindblad Expeditions, a company with almost six decades of expertise in exploring the Antarctic region, showcases the ongoing discovery opportunities with a significant milestone in Puerto Natales, Chile on December 3, 2024. In a historic departure, National Geographic-Lindblad Expeditions embarks on a groundbreaking journey, marking a new chapter in their legacy of exploration and discovery in the White Continent.

news.headline: CKE Restaurants Holdings, Inc. opened the 400th Carl's Jr. restaurant in Mexico, known for its bold flavors and juicy burgers.
news.summary: Today, CKE Restaurants Holdings, Inc. declared the grand opening of the 400th Carl's Jr. outlet in Mexico, solidifying their global presence. Carl's Jr. is celebrated for its robust and flavorful offerings, such as chargrilled burgers and Hand-Breaded Chicken. This milestone signifies the brand's popularity and growth in the Mexican market.

news.headline: Recent U.S. election leads to increased farmer sentiment, Purdue/CME Ag Barometer rises 30 points to 145, highest since May 2021.
news.summary: In December 2024, in West Lafayette, Indiana, the Purdue University/CME Group Ag Economy Barometer reported a significant increase in farmer sentiment. The Barometer rose by 30 points to reach a reading of 145, representing the highest level of farmer optimism recorded since May 2021. This surge in sentiment was fueled by considerable gains in...

news.headline: BofA Global Research predicts strong equity market in 2025, S&P 500 to reach 6666 by year-end amidst uncertainty.
news.summary: Economists and strategists at Bank of America predict that the US economy will maintain its strong performance, with the S&P 500 index projected to reach 6666 by the end of the year. As of December 3, 2024, the economic outlook remains positive, pending further information on potential policy shifts in the country. The projections for 2025 indicate significant potential for growth and development.

news.headline: Martial Law Command: All media and publishers are under our control - Yonhap
CarMax named a founding partner for Golden State Valkyries, becoming their official used car retailer.
news.summary: CarMax has been named the official used car retailer for the Golden State Valkyries. This partnership will allow fans and team members of the Golden State Valkyries access to a wide selection of quality used cars. The Golden State Valkyries, a popular sports team, will now have CarMax as their exclusive used car retailer. This collaboration is expected to provide a convenient and trustworthy source for used cars to the team and its supporters. It signifies a significant agreement between the two entities, benefiting both parties. This partnership is likely to enhance the overall experience for Golden State Valkyries fans and members, offering them a reliable option for purchasing pre-owned vehicles. The alliance between CarMax and the Golden State Valkyries brings together two prominent entities to serve the needs of consumers in the used car market, paving the way for future collaborations.

news.headline: Performance Shipping Inc. secures time charter contract with ExxonMobil at US$33,500/day for 7 months, earning US$6.6 million.
news.summary: Performance Shipping Inc., a global shipping company focusing on tanker vessels, has recently secured a time charter contract for the vessel M/T P. Aliki with SeaRiver Maritime LLC, an ExxonMobil Corporation subsidiary. The contract, set to last seven months with the daily rate of US$33,500 plus/minus 15 days at the Charterer's choice, is expected to start in early December. The deal stands to bring in roughly US$6.6 million in total gross revenue for the company.

news.headline: Arcfield to end year with $420K in charitable donations, partners with Susan G. Komen and Boulder Crest Foundation. Awards 20 microgrants.
news.summary: A new microgrant program focused on community giving has been launched by the company in Chantilly, Virginia. The initiative includes corporate partnerships with Susan G. Komen and the Boulder Crest Foundation. On December 3, 2024, Arcfield, a prominent provider of government technology and mission support, made this announcement.

news.headline: Huron acquires AXIA Consulting to enhance supply chain capabilities in industrials, retail, healthcare sectors. #HURN #supplychain
news.summary: A professional services firm, Huron (NASDAQ: HURN), based in Chicago, has successfully acquired AXIA Consulting, a prominent provider of consulting and technology solutions specializing in supply chain services. The acquisition strengthens Huron's supply chain services, particularly in sectors such as industrials, manufacturing, retail, and healthcare. This move further enriches Huron's Oracle supply chain management offerings and diversifies its technology portfolio by incorporating advanced Microsoft capabilities.

news.headline: South Korea's stock market will operate on Wednesday as usual - Money Today
BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF now holds over 500K BTC valued at $48B, making up 2.38% of total Bitcoin holdings.
news.summary: The latest filing from BlackRock's IBIT indicates they now possess 2.38% of the total Bitcoin supply, holding 500,380 BTC in their books.

news.headline: Acer launches new Nitro Intel Arc B570 OC 10 GB and B580 OC 12 GB graphics cards for high-performance gaming.
news.summary: Introducing the latest graphics cards, the Nitro Intel® Arc™ B570 OC 10 GB and Nitro Intel Arc B580 OC 12 GB. These cards are crafted for top-tier gaming, content creation, and AI-driven activities. They boast the advanced Xe2 architecture with a maximum of 20 cores and impressive clock speeds reaching up to 2,740 MHz.

news.headline: Founder Jennifer A. Beckage from The Beckage Firm represents U.S. at global AI conference in Paris.
news.summary: In December 3, 2024, The Beckage Firm shared the accomplishment of their Founder and Managing Director, Jennifer A. Beckage, Esq., CIPP/US, CIPP/E, as she served as a keynote speaker representing the United States at the prestigious Generative Artificial Intelligence for Lawyers event. This event gathered ##(specific number)## legal professionals and technology experts to discuss the implications of artificial intelligence in the legal field.

news.headline: NF Audio rebrands to NF Acous after 10 years, founded in 2014 by Felix Yang in China. New era of consumer acoustics.
news.summary: NF Audio, established by Felix Yang in 2014, is ushering in a new era in consumer acoustics. The company has officially rebranded as NF ACOUS in commemoration of its ten-year anniversary. Previously known for its expertise in In-Ear Monitors (IEM) in China, NF ACOUS has built a strong reputation over the past decade.

news.headline: Hexagon Digital Wave debuts MAE system for Type 3 gas trailers in Colorado on Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: A premier supplier in the compressed gas distribution sector, Hexagon Digital Wave, has introduced a new service for in-situ requalification of Type 3 gas distribution trailers. This cutting-edge offering utilizes their exclusive Modal Acoustic Emission (MAE) technology. This advancement in requalification services is a significant step forward for industries reliant on gas distribution trailers for various operations.

news.headline: StreamUnlimited updates hardware modules for longevity and seamless integration with StreamSDK, prioritizing extended support and future-proof flexibility.
news.summary: Vienna, on December 3, 2024 - StreamUnlimited, a prominent player in connected audio and IoT solutions, has announced a notable advancement. They have redesigned their hardware modules to offer extended durability and enhance compatibility with StreamSDK. This upgrade guarantees that the modules will stay in sync with evolving technologies in the long run.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile and Cadence team up for AST5000 ASIC, leveraging Cadence tools for global cellular network.
news.summary: In a joint effort, Cadence and AST SpaceMobile have partnered to develop the AST5000 ASIC, a specialized, energy-efficient design. This collaboration merges AST SpaceMobile’s innovative approach with Cadence’s cutting-edge tools, workflows, and intellectual property. The AST5000 ASIC represents a breakthrough in custom technology, combining advanced features with low power consumption. This collaboration highlights the expertise of both companies in creating high-performance solutions.

news.headline: Bollinger Motors gets order for 7 B4 trucks from TEC Equipment with full payment on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: Bollinger Motors completed the full payment for all seven Bollinger B4 trucks via electronic transfer on December 2, 2024, resulting in immediate recognition of revenue for the company.

news.headline: HealthEquity unveils benefits trends for 2025 at SHRM event. Focus on cost transparency and containment to combat rising costs affecting employee satisfaction and benefits utilization.
news.summary: An upcoming event organized by SHRM will address strategies and key points for employers to tackle increasing costs impacting employee satisfaction and benefits utilization. The event aims to provide essential tools and insights for employers facing challenges from escalating costs.
